prestazioni: Mountune MP275 upgrade for the EcoBoost 2.3L (engine code: M234) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbo (0.86 A/R, 62mm compressor, 56mm turbine) pushing 1.5 bar of boost for 380whp on 93 octane with a Cobb Accessport V3 flash (Stage 2+ map) and a custom 3.5" turbo-back exhaust from Milltek Sport (catless downpipe, 76mm tubing, resonated center section)

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Quaife ATB helical LSD (part # QKE10J), PTP Motorsports aluminum differential mount, and a Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel (clutch kit: Spec Stage 3+ with steel-backed organic/carbon hybrid disc) paired with a short-shift kit from Steeda Autosports (25% reduction in throw)

Suspension overhaul: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 30-way rebound, 20mm drop) with poly bushings from SuperPro (part # SPF1319K), Whiteline adjustable front sway bar (24mm hollow, 3-position), and a full chassis brace kit from Cusco (front strut tower bar, rear lower tie bar, and 4-point subframe brace)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and duckbill rear wing) with custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and aggressive camber (4.5° front, 3.2° rear) for flush fitment of Work Meister S1 3P wheels (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +40 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)

Full carbon fiber engine bay dress-up: Seibon carbon fiber hood (vented, 3.5kg weight reduction), Radium Engineering carbon fiber strut brace, and a custom carbon fiber intake pipe (replacing the stock plastic) with a K&N Typhoon cold air intake system (part # 69-3535TP) and a custom heat-shielded turbo inlet from Vibrant Performance

Interior transformation: Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara, part # 387060050) with Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses, a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede, quick-release hub), and a full carbon fiber trim kit from 3D Carbon (dashboard, door cards, center console) paired with a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded, bolt-in)
